narrative_seed_by_week.13: Prompt Engineering / System prompt vs user prompt — context-setting vs asking the question / Core techniques — role assignment, few-shot examples, chain-of-thought prompting / Constraints — telling AI what NOT to do matters as much as what to do / Output format control — JSON, numbered lists, fixed structure through prompt

lab_activity_seed_by_week.13: Apply the 5-role framework to your domain system’s system prompt / Write 3 prompt versions, measure accuracy on 10 domain-relevant test inputs each / Build a simple output validator — if format check fails, retry once; document what the validator caught /  / Create a GitHub repository for your Capstone. Commit with a proper README and .gitignore. Make at least 3 meaningful commits. / Journal Entry #8 — what made your best prompt better? what did the validator catch? / →  Assessment 4 due this week  (see Assessment Plan)
